questionHtml:
What can be deduced from the period number of an element?

  1. Highest occupied energy level
  2. Number of sub-levels in the outer shell
  3. Number of outer electrons


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: What can be deduced from the period number of an element? Highest occupied energy level Number of sub-levels in the outer shell Number of outer electrons A. I and II only B. I and
